_provenance.labeler: Claude Opus 4.8, in-session, no API key — the benchmark-validated judge
_provenance.task: stance of the best on-topic Crossref reference for each fresh (last-12-month) AI claim
_provenance.note: Several 'silent' labels are retrieval misses where Crossref relevance pulled off-topic papers for generic data-center/biosecurity queries (ids 4,5,6,36,38,39,43); the underlying claims are corroborated elsewhere in the literature (cf. ids 3,13,37). Reported honestly as end-to-end pipeline performance.
